delivery.description: Phase 7 Q-15: operator-named CI check allowlist; empty/absent -> 'no-checks-configured' verdict. Phase 9 Q-20: delivery.mode controls ready-to-release delivery behavior.

mode.description: Phase 9 Q-20: 'auto' (default, preserves Phase 7) auto-delivers at ready-to-release. 'gated' pauses after writing delivery/authorization.json so an operator must invoke `protostar-factory deliver`.

evaluation.description: Phase 8 Q-07/Q-08: heterogeneous-local judge model overrides. CLI flags --semantic-judge-model / --consensus-judge-model take precedence; Phase 6 Q-04 mode-resolution pattern.

evolution.description: Phase 8 Q-15/Q-17/Q-18: lineage default, code-evolution opt-in, convergence threshold override. CLI flags --lineage / --evolve-code take precedence.

livenessThresholdMs.description: Threshold in ms for run-liveness derivation; runs with manifest.status=running but no journal append within this window report state=orphaned in `protostar-factory status` (Phase 9 Q-09).

piles.description: Phase 6 (Q-04) per-pile-kind mode selection. Precedence: CLI override (--planning-mode, --review-mode, --exec-coord-mode) > this config > built-in default. Built-in default mode is `fixture` per Q-05. Per Q-06, live failures NEVER auto-fall-back to fixture — they emit a no-admission refusal artifact and the run exits non-zero. Live mode is an explicit operator opt-in.

mode.description: fixture (default per Q-05) or live. CLI flag --planning-mode overrides this value when explicitly provided. Live failure does NOT fall back to fixture (Q-06).

fixturePath.description: Optional path to a fixture file used when mode=fixture.

review.description: Review pile (Q-04, Q-14). When mode=live, the review pile replaces the Phase 5 single-judge passthrough as the ModelReviewer implementation. CLI override flag: --review-mode.

mode.description: fixture (default per Q-05) or live. CLI flag --review-mode overrides this value when explicitly provided. Live failure does NOT fall back to fixture (Q-06).

fixturePath.description: Optional path to a fixture file used when mode=fixture.

executionCoordination.description: Execution-coordination pile (Q-04, Q-15). Both work-slicing and repair-plan triggers share this single preset/budget. CLI override flag: --exec-coord-mode. (JSON key uses camelCase to match TypeScript field names; the FactoryPileKind discriminator string is `execution-coordination`.)

mode.description: fixture (default per Q-05) or live. CLI flag --exec-coord-mode overrides this value when explicitly provided. Live failure does NOT fall back to fixture (Q-06).

fixturePath.description: Optional path to a fixture file used when mode=fixture.

workSlicing.description: Heuristic thresholds for shouldInvokeWorkSlicing(admittedPlan) (Q-15). Defaults are 3 / 5 (Claude's discretion per RESEARCH); Phase 8 will calibrate from dogfood data.

maxTargetFiles.description: If any task's targetFiles count exceeds this, work-slicing is invoked. Default 3.

maxEstimatedTurns.description: If any task's estimatedTurns exceeds this, work-slicing is invoked. Default 5.
